J

JOB_COMPLETED - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.actions
Action sent as a broadcast intent by the Workpath service to an app with a receiver defined in the manifest when a walk-up job is completed.
JobCredentialsAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Job credentials attributes for accessing a stored job from the printer.
JobCredentialsAttributes.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Builder for creating StoredJobAttributes containing stored job attributes.
JobCredentialsAttributes.PasswordType - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Password type for stored copy job.
JobInfo - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Provides the jobtype to distinguish print and scan, jobstate to get the current status and jobdata to retrieve job details.
JobInfo.JobData - Interface in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Provides interface for specific job details
JobInfo.JobState - Interface in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Provides interface for specific job state
JobInfo.JobType - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Defines job types of submitted jobs
JobletAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
The sets of attributes to determine to use a built-in dialog during job.
JobletAttributes.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Builder for constructing the JobletAttributes to configure the Joblet.
JobService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
JobService provides interfaces to monitor submitted job.
JobService.AbstractJobletObserver - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
AbstractJobletObserver provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the submitted job.
